ddls:
CREATE TABLE "words" (
  "word_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each word */,
  "concepticon_id" INTEGER /* Reference ID in the Concepticon database */,
  "aoa_word" TEXT /* The actual word being analyzed */,
  "occur_total" INTEGER /* Total occurrences of the word across texts */,
  "occur_num" INTEGER /* Number of unique texts containing the word */,
  "freq_pm" REAL /* Frequency per million occurrences */,
  "rating_mean" REAL /* Mean rating assigned by users for the word */,
  "rating_sd" REAL /* Standard deviation of the ratings */,
  "dunno" REAL /* Percentage of users who are unsure about the word */,
  "part_of_speech" TEXT /* Part of speech of the word */,
  "etymology" TEXT /* Brief etymology of the word */,
  "phonetic_transcription" TEXT /* Phonetic transcription of the word */,
  "example_context" TEXT /* Common context in which the word is used */,
  "is_common" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the word is common */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the word entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("word_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_words_concepticon_id FOREIGN KEY ("concepticon_id") REFERENCES concepticons ("concepticon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "concepticons" (
  "concepticon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each concept in the Concepticon database */,
  "concept_name" TEXT /* Name of the concept associated with the word */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the concept */,
  "language_of_origin" TEXT /* Language of origin for the concept */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example usage of the concept */,
  "etymology" TEXT /* Brief etymology of the concept */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("concepticon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who provided the rating */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being rated */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was submitted */,
  "user_feedback" TEXT /* Additional feedback provided by the user */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the user's rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, educator, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* User's affiliation (e.g., university, research institute) */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* User's research interests */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user has admin privileges */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., adjectives, nouns) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "example_words" TEXT /* Example words that belong to this category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_category_link" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being linked */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category associated with the word */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the categorization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_category_link_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES word_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_category_link_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "usage_examples" (
  "example_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each example entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being exemplified */,
  "example_text" TEXT /* Sentence containing the word */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the example */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context for the example */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("example_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_usage_examples_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "synonyms" (
  "synonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synonym entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word for which the synonym is listed */,
  "synonym_word" TEXT /* Synonym of the word */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the synonym */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synonyms_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "antonyms" (
  "antonym_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each antonym entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word for which the antonym is listed */,
  "antonym_word" TEXT /* Antonym of the word */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the antonym */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("antonym_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_antonyms_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being commented on */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback provided by the user */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "is_resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the feedback has been addressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "language_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word for which the variant is listed */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language or dialect of the variant */,
  "variant_word" TEXT /* The actual variant of the word */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the variant */,
  "example_usage" TEXT /* Example usage of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_language_variants_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_origin" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word whose origin is documented */,
  "origin_text" TEXT /* Text describing the origin of the word */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the origin information */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence level of the origin information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_origin_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "word_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "word_id" INTEGER /* ID of the word being tracked */,
  "date_tracked" TEXT /* Date when the usage was recorded */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Count of occurrences on that date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data */,
  "context" TEXT /* Additional context for the trend data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_word_trends_word_id FOREIGN KEY ("word_id") REFERENCES words ("word_id")
)
